title: Sit And Skull
description:
a papermc/spigot plugin that allows you to sit anyware, 
and a player skull place's at player's death location
body:
# **Sit and Skull**

_feeling a bit bored?_

**a papermc/spigot plugin** 


- this plugin allows the player to sit anyware when /sit command is used,
- it place's a players head at players death location so it can be identify as a death scene


  
  _it looks good if your doing a content or maybe just playing with your friends_
